title: Les Pardaillan — Tome 05 : Pardaillan et Fausta
summaries: "Les Pardaillan — Tome 05 : Pardaillan et Fausta" by Michel Zévaco is a novel serialized between 1902 and 1918. This fifth volume forms the third cycle of the Pardaillan series, set in Spain under Philip II. The story continues the epic struggle between the heroic swordsman Pardaillan and the dangerous Princess Fausta, a descendant of the Borgias. Their passionate conflict spans across European history, blending love and enmity as they battle for opposing visions of power and freedom during a turbulent era.
